chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.2874 of 2025 Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah 17.11.2025 Mr. Sher Muhammad Joyo, advocate for Applicant. Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, A.P.G. = O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J:- Applicant was arrested on 07.06.2025 by a Police Team of P.S. from Shah Latif Town, Karachi from an area adjacent to Sector 19/B Shah Latif Town, Karachi and from him 659 grams of Charas was recovered, hence he was booked in the present case. 2. Applicant’s counsel argument for bail is that the offence does not fall within prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. He is the first offender and before registration of FIR various applications were moved apprehending his false implication. Learned APG has opposed bail, however, since the offence does not fall within the prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. and there is no criminal record of the applicant showing his involvement in the identical cases. We allow this application and the applicant is granted bail subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/- and P.R. bond in the same amount to the satisfaction of the trial court. 3. The observations made herein above are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. This Cr. Bail Application is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Imran
